description: Level entry 3 BEDROOMS 3 BATHROOMS duplex-style townhouse in sought after Country Crossing! Family and pet friendly complex located on the North side of the train tracks. Large main floor w/ 9' CEILINGS, half BATHROOM,  OPEN CONCEPT living and dining room, cozy GAS FIREPLACE, kitchen w/ ISLAND & EAT-IN DINING area. Upper floor has 3 GENEROUS SIZED bedrooms, 2 FULL BATHROOMS and LAUNDRY ROOM. Large primary bedroom w/ WALK-IN CLOSET and ENSUITE bath. Fully fenced SW facing YARD w/ PATIO. Single car GARAGE. Additional parking stall available. PRIME WALKABLE LOCATION to shopping, restaurants, Highland Park Elementary and Rec centre. Easy access to Lougheed Hwy & Westcoast Express for commuters. 2 PETS.
